dokploy-internal-http|http|http://dokploy:3000|200,302|critical|5||bootstrap/dokploy
vault-internal-http|http|http://vault:8200/v1/sys/health|200,429,472,473|critical|5||bootstrap/vault
minio-internal-http|http|http://platform-minio${ENV_SUFFIX}:9000/minio/health/live|200|critical|5||platform/minio
authentik-internal-http|http|http://platform-authentik-server${ENV_SUFFIX}:9000/-/health/live/|200,204,302|critical|5||platform/authentik
prefect-internal-http|http|http://platform-prefect-server${ENV_SUFFIX}:4200/api/health|200|critical|5||platform/prefect
# signoz/clickhouse are prod_only (single shared instance; every env ships its data to
# prod — see platform/{11.signoz,03.clickhouse}/deploy.py `prod_only = True`). Probe the
# prod instance from ALL envs (no ${ENV_SUFFIX}), matching openpanel below. Adding a
# -staging suffix targets a host that never exists -> a permanent false-positive alert.
signoz-internal-http|http|http://platform-signoz:8080/api/v1/health|200|critical|5||platform/signoz
# otel 畅通: the OTLP ingest pipeline itself (collector health_check ext :13133),
# distinct from the signoz query svc above. prod_only single instance (no suffix).
otel-collector-http|http|http://platform-signoz-otel-collector:13133|200|critical|5||platform/signoz
# SigNoz round-trip: write a synthetic OTLP log through the collector, then
# query ClickHouse for the same nonce. This proves ingest + storage, not just
# process readiness.
# depends_on signoz-internal-http (7th field): if SigNoz itself is down the round-trip
# also fails — cascade-suppress the round-trip symptom, page the signoz root only.
signoz-roundtrip|command|python /app/tools/observability_roundtrip_probe.py signoz|roundtrip-ok|critical|45|signoz-internal-http|platform/signoz
alert-bridge-http|http|http://platform-alerting${ENV_SUFFIX}:8080/health|200|critical|5||platform/alerting
# lark 畅通: bridge config valid AND Feishu host reachable (TCP 443), checked
# without posting to the real channel (see app.py /health/feishu).
lark-delivery-http|http|http://platform-alerting${ENV_SUFFIX}:8080/health/feishu|200|critical|5||platform/alerting
# NOTE: the 6h real-send `alert-delivery-canary` was retired (#425 T3): it posted a
# synthetic *alert* every 6h purely to prove the bridge→Feishu path — a periodic
# alert (the anti-pattern #425 forbids). The path is now covered without channel
# noise by `lark-delivery-http` (config valid + Feishu reachable, no real post),
# the out-of-band watchdog's independent bridge /health check, the daily reports'
# own Feishu delivery, and real alerts when they fire.
platform-postgres-tcp|tcp|platform-postgres${ENV_SUFFIX}:5432|connected|critical|5||platform/postgres
platform-redis-tcp|tcp|platform-redis${ENV_SUFFIX}:6379|connected|critical|5||platform/redis
# ClickHouse liveness is no longer probed by a read-only /ping: it stays 200 even
# when the data dir is unwritable (read green / write dead). The truthful signals
# replace it — op-ch & platform-clickhouse now have WRITE-PATH healthchecks
# (unhealthy -> Dokploy restart), and signoz/openpanel-roundtrip are the alert path
# (they write+query, so they catch write-broken AND down). A /ping caught neither
# better than those, so it is removed rather than kept as dead compensation.
op-connect-http|http|http://op-connect-api:8080/health|200|critical|5||bootstrap/1password
iac-runner-http|http|http://iac-runner:8080/health|200|warning|5||bootstrap/iac-runner
openpanel-api-http|http|http://platform-openpanel-api:3000/healthcheck|200|warning|5||platform/openpanel
openpanel-worker-http|http|http://platform-openpanel-worker:3000/healthcheck|200|warning|5||platform/openpanel
openpanel-dashboard-http|http|http://platform-openpanel-dashboard:3000/api/healthcheck|200|warning|5||platform/openpanel
# OpenPanel round-trip: write a synthetic /track event to the env-specific
# finance project, then query OpenPanel ClickHouse for the nonce.
# depends_on openpanel-api-http: if the API is down the round-trip cannot write —
# cascade-suppress the round-trip, page the api root only.
openpanel-roundtrip|command|python /app/tools/observability_roundtrip_probe.py openpanel|roundtrip-ok|warning|45|openpanel-api-http|platform/openpanel
# Host resource backstop — out-of-band from SigNoz, so it still fires when
# the host is starved (the dockerd-busy-loop class of incident). `expected`
# is the % ceiling; reads host-global /proc + the bind-mounted host root.
# Runs on the PRODUCTION runner only (the host is shared) — see
# infra_probe_runner._host_specs_for_env.
host-cpu|resource|cpu|80|warning|5||infra/host
host-mem|resource|mem|80|warning|5||infra/host
host-disk|resource|disk:/hostfs|80|critical|5||infra/host
